operations.summary: DelegatorDelegations queries all delegations of a given delegator address.

parameters.name: delegatorAddr
parameters.description: delegator_addr defines the delegator address to query for.

parameters.name: pagination.key
parameters.description:
key is a value returned in PageResponse.next_key to begin
querying the next page most efficiently. Only one of offset or key
should be set.

parameters.name: pagination.offset
parameters.description:
offset is a numeric offset that can be used when key is unavailable.
It is less efficient than using key. Only one of offset or key should
be set.

parameters.name: pagination.limit
parameters.description:
limit is the total number of results to be returned in the result page.
If left empty it will default to a value to be set by each app.

parameters.name: pagination.countTotal
parameters.description:
count_total is set to true  to indicate that the result set should include
a count of the total number of items available for pagination in UIs.
count_total is only respected when offset is used. It is ignored when key
is set.

parameters.name: pagination.reverse
parameters.description: reverse is set to true if results are to be returned in the descending order.

operations.summary: Redelegations queries redelegations of given address.

parameters.name: delegatorAddr
parameters.description: delegator_addr defines the delegator address to query for.

parameters.name: srcValidatorAddr
parameters.description: src_validator_addr defines the validator address to redelegate from.

parameters.name: dstValidatorAddr
parameters.description: dst_validator_addr defines the validator address to redelegate to.

parameters.name: pagination.key
parameters.description:
key is a value returned in PageResponse.next_key to begin
querying the next page most efficiently. Only one of offset or key
should be set.

parameters.name: pagination.offset
parameters.description:
offset is a numeric offset that can be used when key is unavailable.
It is less efficient than using key. Only one of offset or key should
be set.

parameters.name: pagination.limit
parameters.description:
limit is the total number of results to be returned in the result page.
If left empty it will default to a value to be set by each app.

parameters.name: pagination.countTotal
parameters.description:
count_total is set to true  to indicate that the result set should include
a count of the total number of items available for pagination in UIs.
count_total is only respected when offset is used. It is ignored when key
is set.

parameters.name: pagination.reverse
parameters.description: reverse is set to true if results are to be returned in the descending order.

operations.summary:
DelegatorValidator queries validator info for given delegator validator
pair.

parameters.description: delegator_addr defines the delegator address to query for.

parameters.description: validator_addr defines the validator address to query for.

operations.summary: HistoricalInfo queries the historical info for given height.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: height defines at which height to query the historical info.
